name: Oracle
overview: Oracle is a multinational technology corporation specializing in database software, cloud systems, and enterprise solutions.
hiringProcess: Oracle's process typically includes an online assessment, 2 technical interviews, a managerial round, and HR discussion.
eligibility: Good understanding of databases, Java proficiency, CS fundamentals.
preparationTips: Focus on SQL queries, Java OOP concepts, and medium-level DSA. Understand database internals.
